title: Syria says it seized Hezbollah weapons at Iraqi border
gist: A Middle East Minute podcast episode description notes that the US expanded its strikes on Iran overnight to target northern areas, broadening a campaign that had previously focused on the Iranian coast.

insights.claim: The US expanded its strikes on Iran overnight to target areas in the north of the country, after previously concentrating strikes on the coast.
insights.speaker: Al-Monitor
insights.so_what: Geographic broadening of the strike campaign into Iran's interior suggests an expanding target set beyond coastal assets — worth tracking for signs of campaign intensification.
insights.locator: The US expanded its strikes on Iran overnight
